auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Brave Search API key sent with the X-Subscription-Token header. Create or view API keys in the Brave Search API dashboard: https://api.search.brave.com/app/keys.

actions.name: image_search
actions.description: Search Brave's image index for images related to a query.

q.description: The user's search query term. Maximum of 400 characters.

search_lang.description: The preferred search result language code.

country.description: The two-letter country code for result localization, or ALL for worldwide results.

safesearch.description: Filters adult content from image results.

count.description: The maximum number of image results to return.

spellcheck.description: Whether Brave Search should spellcheck the query before searching.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Brave Search image request.

anyOf.description: Query metadata returned by Brave Search.

items.description: One image result item returned by Brave Search.

results.description: The list of image results returned by Brave Search.

anyOf.description: Additional metadata returned with the image results.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Brave Search image response.

actions.name: news_search
actions.description: Search Brave's news index for recent articles related to a query.

q.description: The user's search query term. Maximum of 400 characters.

search_lang.description: The preferred search result language code.

ui_lang.description: The preferred user interface language for response formatting.

country.description: The two-letter country code for result localization, or ALL for worldwide results.

safesearch.description: Filters adult content from news results.

count.description: The maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: The zero-based results page offset used for pagination.

spellcheck.description: Whether Brave Search should spellcheck the query before searching.

anyOf.description: A predefined freshness window such as past day or past year.
A custom date range in the format YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD.

freshness.description: Filters news results by page age.

extra_snippets.description: Whether Brave Search should return extra alternate snippets.

anyOf.description: One goggle URL or inline definition.

items.description: One goggle URL or inline definition.

anyOf.description: Multiple goggles to apply to the search request.

goggles.description: One or more Brave Search goggles used to rerank results.

operators.description: Whether Brave Search should apply search operators.

include_fetch_metadata.description: Whether Brave Search should include fetch metadata in results when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Brave Search news request.

anyOf.description: Query metadata returned by Brave Search.

items.description: One news result item returned by Brave Search.

results.description: The list of news results returned by Brave Search.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Brave Search news response.

actions.name: video_search
actions.description: Search Brave's video index for videos related to a query.

q.description: The user's search query term. Maximum of 400 characters.

search_lang.description: The preferred search result language code.

ui_lang.description: The preferred user interface language for response formatting.

country.description: The two-letter country code for result localization, or ALL for worldwide results.

safesearch.description: Filters adult content from video results.

count.description: The maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: The zero-based results page offset used for pagination.

spellcheck.description: Whether Brave Search should spellcheck the query before searching.

anyOf.description: A predefined freshness window such as past day or past year.
A custom date range in the format YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD.

freshness.description: Filters video results by page age.

operators.description: Whether Brave Search should apply search operators.

include_fetch_metadata.description: Whether Brave Search should include fetch metadata in results when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Brave Search video request.

anyOf.description: Query metadata returned by Brave Search.

items.description: One video result item returned by Brave Search.

results.description: The list of video results returned by Brave Search.

anyOf.description: Additional metadata returned with the video results.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Brave Search video response.

actions.name: web_search
actions.description: Search the Brave Search web index and return the selected result families.

q.description: The user's search query term. Maximum of 400 characters.

search_lang.description: The preferred search result language code.

ui_lang.description: The preferred user interface language for response formatting.

country.description: The two-letter country code for result localization, or ALL for worldwide results.

safesearch.description: Filters adult content from web results.

count.description: The maximum number of web results to return.

offset.description: The zero-based results page offset used for pagination.

spellcheck.description: Whether Brave Search should spellcheck the query before searching.

anyOf.description: A predefined freshness window such as past day or past year.
A custom date range in the format YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD.

freshness.description: Filters web results by page age.

result_filter.description: A comma-delimited list of result types to include, such as web,news,videos,locations,discussions,faq,infobox,mixed,summarizer or rich.

extra_snippets.description: Whether Brave Search should return extra alternate snippets.

anyOf.description: One goggle URL or inline definition.

items.description: One goggle URL or inline definition.

anyOf.description: Multiple goggles to apply to the search request.

goggles.description: One or more Brave Search goggles used to rerank results.

text_decorations.description: Whether display strings should include decoration markers such as highlights.

units.description: The measurement units used for localized results.

operators.description: Whether Brave Search should apply search operators.

include_fetch_metadata.description: Whether Brave Search should include fetch metadata in results when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Brave Search web search request.

anyOf.description: Query metadata returned by Brave Search.
Web result payload returned by Brave Search.
News result payload returned by Brave Search.
Video result payload returned by Brave Search.
Location result payload returned by Brave Search.
Discussion clusters returned by Brave Search.
Frequently asked questions returned by Brave Search.
Infobox payload returned by Brave Search.
Mixed ranking payload returned by Brave Search.
Summary metadata returned by Brave Search.
Rich result callback payload returned by Brave Search.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Brave Search web search response.
